package rulecoverage

func NegativeCgoStringLifetime() string {
    ruleID := "cgo_string_lifetime"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`C.CString(goString)` without a corresponding `C.free` in the same function, or deferred `C.free`"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
